For kitchen & bath businesses

Your free 30-minute strategy session

In 30 minutes we break down the three things that decide who homeowners call: your website, your Google ranking, and AI search. Then I study your biggest competitors and hand you the exact gameplan to beat them.

Join the owners already winning their market.

You leave with the plan — yours to keep, even if we never work together.

Last thing — your business.

You leave with the written plan whether we ever work together or not.

You’re on the books

You’re on the books.

Check your email for the time and the call link. Before we talk, I’ll dig into your business’s setup so we don’t waste a minute playing catch-up.

See you then.
— Shane
